description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, softly ribbed neckline and graphic lettering on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If you want to catch people by surprise, try this black tantra tee. With the words “Dude your fly is open” printed on the front, it is bound to grab people's attention! Team it with jeans or shorts, and get cheeky!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
